title: Legacy001 extended combo target encoding
summary: Add a small controlled set of additional combo target encodings to the legacy-001 root.
rationale: The root uses target encoding only for Race-Compound and Race-Year combinations. A narrow extension can test whether tyre-life, pit-stop count, compound, and progress interactions contain target-regularized signal without turning the experiment into broad feature expansion.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py. Add only a small number of extra combo columns to the existing TargetEncoder path, such as Compound with TyreLife_cat_, Race-Compound-TyreLife_cat_, Race-Compound-PitStop_cat_, or Year-Compound-RaceProgress bin. Use the existing fold-safe TargetEncoder configuration. Do not change model family, folds, manual feature blocks, or artifact names.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if the target-encoded combo categories capture pit-stop strategy interactions missed by the current two combos.
risk: Extra target encoding can overfit OOF, especially for sparse combinations, even with cross-fold encoding and smoothing.
